subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though until now the tokens of faith and certitude have been manifest from thy presence, and proofs of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر چند تا بحال آثار ایمان و ایقان از آنحضرت ظاهر و دلائل ثبوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @effort; striving
